title: Information for panel physicians :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Information for panel physicians
This section gives information for the panel physician network — doctors around the world who can complete medical examinations for visa applicants.
- Only panel physicians can do medical examinations for visas Medical professionals must be on the panel of physicians to complete medical examinations for visa applications. They must also use e-Medical, an online system for processing immigration medical examinations.

## Only panel physicians can do medical examinations for visas
Medical professionals must be on the panel of physicians to complete medical examinations for visa applications. They must also use e-Medical, an online system for processing immigration medical examinations.
- Rules for panel physicians Panel physician instructions outline the requirements for immigration medical examinations.

## Rules for panel physicians
Panel physician instructions outline the requirements for immigration medical examinations.
- Refugee settlement health assessments Information and forms for physicians doing refugee settlement health assessments.

## Refugee settlement health assessments
Information and forms for physicians doing refugee settlement health assessments.
- Test instructions and examination information for panel physicians You must follow specific testing requirements when you examine applicants. Use these tools and instructions to help you during immigration medical examinations.

## Test instructions and examination information for panel physicians
You must follow specific testing requirements when you examine applicants. Use these tools and instructions to help you during immigration medical examinations.
- Training for the panel physician network Training opportunities for the Immigration New Zealand panel physician network.

## Training for the panel physician network
Training opportunities for the Immigration New Zealand panel physician network.
